@if (bar(); as b) {
{{ formattedTime() }}

OHLCV

O {{ b.open | number: '1.2-2' }}
H {{ b.high | number: '1.2-2' }}
L {{ b.low | number: '1.2-2' }}
C {{ b.close | number: '1.2-2' }}
Wave Identity
Side {{ b.ms_wave_side || '--' }}
ID {{ b.ms_wave_id || '--' }}
Count {{ fmtInt(b.ms_wave_count) }}
Length {{ fmtInt(b.ms_wave_length) }}
Price Levels
Last Top {{ fmtPrice(b.ms_last_top_price) }}
Last Bottom {{ fmtPrice(b.ms_last_bottom_price) }}
High Since {{ fmtInt(b.ms_high_since) }}
Low Since {{ fmtInt(b.ms_low_since) }}
Forming High {{ fmtPrice(b.ms_forming_wave_high) }}
Forming Low {{ fmtPrice(b.ms_forming_wave_low) }}
Structure
HH HL LH LL
Trends
Trending @if (b.ms_is_trending_up) { UP } @else if (b.ms_is_trending_down) { DOWN } @else { -- }
Support Zone
Range {{ fmtPrice(b.ms_support_zone_low) }} - {{ fmtPrice(b.ms_support_zone_high) }}
Wick Bounds {{ fmtPrice(b.ms_support_zone_wick_low) }} - {{ fmtPrice(b.ms_support_zone_wick_high) }}
Double Bottom
Overlaps {{ fmtInt(b.ms_support_overlap_count) }}
Resistance Zone
Range {{ fmtPrice(b.ms_resistance_zone_low) }} - {{ fmtPrice(b.ms_resistance_zone_high) }}
Wick Bounds {{ fmtPrice(b.ms_resistance_zone_wick_low) }} - {{ fmtPrice(b.ms_resistance_zone_wick_high) }}
Double Top
Overlaps {{ fmtInt(b.ms_resistance_overlap_count) }}
Divergence
Bullish Bearish --
Pullback
Correction {{ fmtRatio(b.ms_pullback_correction_factor) }}
Length {{ fmtInt(b.ms_pullback_length) }}
Breakout Level {{ fmtPrice(b.ms_pullback_breakout_level) }}
Price Diff {{ fmtPrice(b.ms_pullback_price_diff) }}
Trend Structure
Break Level {{ fmtPrice(b.ms_structure_break_level) }}
Break Confirmed @if (b.ms_structure_break_confirmed) { SB } @else { -- }
Trend Waves {{ fmtInt(b.ms_trend_wave_count) }}
Trend Duration {{ fmtInt(b.ms_trend_duration) }}
Three Push @if (b.ms_three_push_up) { 3P Up } @if (b.ms_three_push_down) { 3P Down } @if (!b.ms_three_push_up && !b.ms_three_push_down) { -- }
Wave Metrics
Amplitude {{ fmtAtr(b.ms_wave_amplitude) }}
Slope {{ fmtAtr(b.ms_wave_slope) }}
Volume {{ fmtInt(b.ms_wave_volume) }}
Volume Ratio {{ fmtRatio(b.ms_wave_volume_ratio) }}
Amplitude Ratio {{ fmtRatio(b.ms_wave_amplitude_ratio) }}
Pullback Metrics
ATR Factor {{ fmtAtr(b.ms_pullback_atr_factor) }}
Zone Quality
Support {{ fmtScore(b.ms_zone_quality_support) }} @if (qualityLabel(b.ms_zone_quality_support); as lbl) { ({{ lbl }}) }
Resistance {{ fmtScore(b.ms_zone_quality_resistance) }} @if (qualityLabel(b.ms_zone_quality_resistance); as lbl) { ({{ lbl }}) }
Zone Lifecycle
Break Sup Break Res Retest Sup Retest Res Flip Sup Flip Res FR Sup FR Res --
Retest Count Sup {{ fmtInt(b.ms_zone_retest_count_support) }}
Retest Count Res {{ fmtInt(b.ms_zone_retest_count_resistance) }}
Volatility & Distance
ATR {{ fmtAtrRaw(b.ms_atr) }}
Dist to Support {{ fmtDistance(b.ms_distance_to_support, 'support') }}
Dist to Resistance {{ fmtDistance(b.ms_distance_to_resistance, 'resistance') }}
Swing Failure Pattern
SFP High @if (b.ms_sfp_high) { SFP } @else { -- }
SFP Low @if (b.ms_sfp_low) { SFP } @else { -- }
Bars Since Top {{ fmtInt(b.ms_bars_since_last_top) }}
Bars Since Bottom {{ fmtInt(b.ms_bars_since_last_bottom) }}
} @else {
+ Hover over a candle
}
